title: RGIPT – GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: RGIPT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for GeM/ CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) has released recruitment notification 2026 for 1 GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive post on a contractual basis. Candidates with Bachelor’s/Master’s degree can apply via email before 07-06-2026 through the official RGIPT website.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Commerce, Management, Engineering, or related field

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RGIPT GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
